name: @tfl5/sdk
description: Official JS/TS client for the tfl5 platform — wraps the fixed REST contract (spine apps→groups/roles/resources/docs, hooks, operators, field-level encryption, shares, files).

scripts.build:browser: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=es2021 --minify --outfile=./dist/browser/sdk.mjs && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=iife --global-name=__tfl5sdk --target=es2021 --minify --footer:js="if(typeof window!=='undefined'){window.TFL5=__tfl5sdk.TFL5;window.tfl5sdk=__tfl5sdk;}" --outfile=./dist/browser/sdk.js && esbuild src/ui.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=es2021 --minify --outfile=./dist/browser/sdk-ui.mjs && esbuild src/ui.ts --bundle --format=iife --global-name=tfl5ui --target=es2021 --minify --outfile=./dist/browser/sdk-ui.js
